languages.text: "Говоришь, ты питаешься какими-то составами? Дай попробовать".
"You say you subsist on certain formulations? Let me try."
languages.original_text: "Говоришь, ты питаешься какими-то составами? Дай попробовать".

traits.locale_text: "You say you subsist on certain formulations? Let me try."
"You say you subsist on certain formulations? Let me try."
"You say you subsist on certain formulations? Let me try."

languages.text: «¿Dice que subsiste a base de ciertas formulaciones? Déjeme probar alguna».
languages.original_text: "You say you subsist on certain formulations? Let me try."

traits.locale_text: «¿Dice que subsiste a base de ciertas formulaciones? Déjeme probar alguna».

languages.text: “你说你依靠某种制剂维持生命？让我也尝尝。”
languages.original_text: "You say you subsist on certain formulations? Let me try."

traits.locale_text: “你说你依靠某种制剂维持生命？让我也尝尝。”

languages.text: « Vous dites que vous assurez votre subsistance avec des formules spéciales ? Laissez-moi y goûter. »
languages.original_text: "You say you subsist on certain formulations? Let me try."

traits.locale_text: « Vous dites que vous assurez votre subsistance avec des formules spéciales ? Laissez-moi y goûter. »

languages.text: "Belirli formüllerle hayatta kaldığını mı söylüyorsun? Bir deneyeyim."
languages.original_text: "You say you subsist on certain formulations? Let me try."

traits.locale_text: "Belirli formüllerle hayatta kaldığını mı söylüyorsun? Bir deneyeyim."

languages.text: 「君は特定の栄養剤で生きていると言うのか？ 試させてくれ」
languages.original_text: "You say you subsist on certain formulations? Let me try."

traits.locale_text: 「君は特定の栄養剤で生きていると言うのか？ 試させてくれ」

languages.text: "Ihr sagt, Ihr lebt von einer spezifischen Nahrung? Lasst mich kosten."
languages.original_text: "You say you subsist on certain formulations? Let me try."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr sagt, Ihr lebt von einer spezifischen Nahrung? Lasst mich kosten."
